general.deployDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to deploy this Redis?
general.deployTooltip: Downloads and sets up the Redis instance
general.reloadDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to reload this Redis?
general.reloadTooltip: Restart the Redis service without rebuilding
general.startDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to start this Redis?
general.startTooltip: Start Redis (requires a previous successful setup)
general.stopDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to stop this Redis?
general.stopTooltip: Stop the currently running Redis instance
general.openTerminalTooltip: Open a terminal to the Redis container

external.cardDescription: To make Redis reachable over the internet, set a port and ensure it is not used by another application or database.
external.ipWarningPrefix: You need to set an IP address in your
external.ipLinkRemote: Remote servers → Server → Edit server → Update IP address
external.ipLinkWebServer: Web server → Server → Update server IP
